message:
fix(gateway): handle binary request bodies in idempotency middleware

The idempotency middleware was converting request bodies to text before
fingerprinting, which could fail or produce incorrect hashes for binary
payloads (e.g., file uploads, protocol buffers).

Changes:
- Use arrayBuffer() instead of text() for body capture
- Generate fingerprints directly from ArrayBuffer data
- Properly concatenate meta string with binary body for hashing
- Update Content-Length header based on actual byte length

Also:
- Add @playwright/test dev dependency for E2E testing infrastructure
- Add test-utils directory scaffolding for gateway integration tests

This ensures idempotency keys work correctly for all content types,
not just text-based requests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
